chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ مَاتَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهُ وَارِثٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 61 – One dies and there is no inheritor for him

text: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الْأَوَّلِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ الْإِمَامُ وَارِثُ مَنْ لَا وَارِثَ لَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from one of our companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> the 1<sup>st</sup> having said: ‘The Imam<sup>asws</sup> is the inheritor of the one who has no inheritor for him’.
